steps.title: Use the requested difference
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between C-type and S-type asteroids. The notes give a direct compositional contrast: C-type asteroids are primarily carbon, while S-type asteroids are primarily silicate minerals.

steps.title: Keep focus on contrast
steps.content: A just says both are asteroid types, B explains classification generally, and C gives a percentage for S-type asteroids without clearly contrasting it with C-type asteroids. The choice that directly contrasts their compositions accomplishes the goal. The answer is D.
